_bankroll_doctrine_2026_05_04: Bankroll truth comes solely from on-chain wallet via src.runtime.bankroll_provider.current() (5-min stale-cache window). Removed in this cleanup: fixed config-bankroll authority and temporary per-trade/aggregate cap rails. Smoke testing must run as a separate one-off script, not as a perma-gate that throttles real live trading. Per-cycle exposure discipline now lives in posture / RiskGuard / max-exposure gates only.
_low_purity_doctrine_2026_05_07: LOW Platt has no contract-bin-preserving fallback proof yet. Operator-approved (PR #93, 2026-05-07): if the exact LOW primary bucket is missing, UNVERIFIED, QUARANTINED, or below the live n_eff floor (calibration.maturity_thresholds level2), the live read seam returns RAW_UNCALIBRATED (level 4) rather than borrowing another cluster's Platt transform or rescuing via the legacy metric-only LOW data_version. Rationale: legacy LOW buckets were built under a different local-day construction law than the contract-window v2 authority; silent fallback would mix incommensurable training corpora into live sizing decisions. HIGH retains the existing season-pool fallback (its construction law is stable across legacy and v2). Reference: src/calibration/manager.py::_candidate_data_versions_for_metric_source, get_calibrator LOW early-return.

ensemble._n_mc_note: Runtime per-trade Monte Carlo iterations. Bumped 2026-04-29 from 5000 (LAW 4 forbidden move 7 floor) to 10000 for tighter per-trade SE (0.0071 -> 0.005 at p=0.5). Training calibration_pairs_v2 was rebuilt at n_mc=5000 on 2026-04-29; LAW 4 derivation shows that aggregate Platt fit difference between 5000 and 10000 is < 1e-3 sigma (label noise dominates). Future re-rebuild at 10000 is queued in backlog for full pipeline symmetry but is empirically not load-bearing for fit quality.
ensemble._min_members_floor_rationale_2026_05_19: ECMWF Open Data partial dissemination at 48-50 is statistically equivalent to full 51 for variance estimation under our Monte Carlo strategies. Strict 51-only gate caused 40-45% systematic discard for weeks. Floor of 40 keeps fail-closed for genuinely degraded ensembles (< 40 = unreliable variance) while admitting statistically-viable partial ensembles.

probability_sanity._probability_sanity_note_2026_05_23: P0 follow-up §4: thresholds for validate_high_distribution (day0 HIGH sanity gate). point_bucket_high_prob/min_member_support guard the POINT_BUCKET_HIGH_PROB_WITHOUT_MEMBER_SUPPORT gate; low_price_threshold/low_price_high_prob guard EXTREME_MARKET_DISAGREEMENT_LOW_PRICE_HIGH_PROB. Values equal the prior hardcoded constants — externalized for operator tuning without behavior change. The validator falls back to these defaults if this block is absent.

probability_edge_bin_sanity._note_2026_05_24: LIVE-PROB-P0 §F operator binding spec (2026-05-23); apply-metrics enforcement added 2026-05-24. GATE SEMANTICS: pure market-deference — any strictly-sub-floor (0 < p_mkt < 0.05) edge bin with cal/mkt ratio>=3.0 in a contiguous tail run>=2 is REJECTED. BIMODAL PROTECTION: bins with p_raw>=0.05 AND p_mkt>=0.05 (market and members agree on the secondary mode) PASS unconditionally — at the exact equality boundary p_mkt==0.05, BIMODAL PROTECTION takes precedence. For bins with p_mkt strictly below 0.05 the market disagrees regardless of member count; rejection applies and member support appears in telemetry only. APPLY-METRICS: hard mode fires when metric IN apply_to_metrics (i.e. HIGH); LOW is unvalidated → shadow/log-only. apply_to_strategies is ADVISORY METADATA ONLY — NOT a hard gate filter. Excluding any active live strategy (e.g. opening_inertia, the highest-volume live strategy) would create a phantom hole. The hard gate applies to ALL non-day0 strategies for the listed metric(s). FP=0 proven for HIGH across all strategies. Authority: /Users/leofitz/.claude/jobs/866db2ea/IMPL_SPEC_operator.md §F.

edli._edli_live_scope_note_2026_06_12: operator directive 2026-06-12 (third and final word): day0 LIVE NOW, no shadow staging, no canary — '现在就解除这些限制'. The 06-10 interim revert is over; correctness work (METAR fast lane entry fallback, receipt dual-persist, undercapture audit) continues in parallel but never gates the scope.
edli._edli_live_scope_note_2026_06_09: Operator directive 2026-06-09 ('全部打开，这些shadow only的策略一辈子都不会主动打开，把这些gate都删了'): promoted from day0_shadow to forecast_plus_day0 — day0-lane events now PASS the DAY0_SCOPE_SHADOW_ONLY adapter boundary (real submit subject to all OTHER proofs/gates/arm). day0 flags (day0_extreme_trigger_enabled, day0_hard_fact_live_enabled) were already true; the shadow-only purgatory gate is the only thing that was blocking day0 real submit. forecast_only (PR-332) and day0_shadow regression behavior are unchanged.
edli._edli_emos_sole_calibrator_enabled_note: #110/ELEVATION S2 (2026-06-04) ONE-CALIBRATOR seam, DEFAULT FALSE (flag-OFF byte-identical: the existing bias/grid/identity-Platt path runs unchanged). When ON, the traded q for a served=emos (city,season) cell IS the EMOS predictive N(mu,sigma): point p_cal = analytic q_vec (bin_probability_settlement), and the q_lcb bootstrap draws from the SAME N(mu,sigma) (one sigma feeds point AND lcb; no ensemble-spread double-count; fixes the point under-dispersion that manufactures the far-OTM buy_no flood). served=raw/missing -> None -> the honest path runs (NEVER the bias maze on a served=raw cell). Lead-tail skill-loss travels in EMOS sigma (e*lead), not the mean (the structural cold-shift fix). Day0 paths exempt (realized obs replaces the forecast). SHADOW-prove gate before promote: per-city settled win-rate under EMOS >= the maze. Authority: plan compiled-foraging-quail.md; src/calibration/emos_q_builder.build_emos_q; tests/test_emos_sole_calibrator.py INV-1..5.
edli._q_lcb_settlement_coverage_gate_note: Phase-2 K3 (2026-06-03) SHADOW FLAG, DEFAULT FALSE (HIGH risk: it moves the live q_lcb). When ON, the live q_lcb LCB is licensed against the REALIZED settlement win-rate in its band (settlement_outcomes graded ONLY through the spine grade_receipt): settlement_backward_coverage_check returns LICENSED (q_lcb unchanged) | UNLICENSED (shrink q_lcb to realized-1pp, calibration_source SETTLEMENT_ISOTONIC) | INSUFFICIENT_DATA (<min_n settled obs -> unchanged + WARN). K<<N: the coverage verdict is the EMOS k_cov INPUT (src/calibration/emos_ci_license.py), NOT a 7th coverage layer atop the existing flags. With this flag OFF the coverage table is COMPUTED but NOT applied and the live q_lcb is byte-identical to today (test_apply_coverage_flag_off_is_byte_identical). The ARM gate reads the coverage verdict UNCONDITIONALLY (arm_gate_coverage_blocks): arming requires coverage_ratio not None and |ratio-1|<0.10, and blocks on UNLICENSED, independent of this shrink flag. K2 COUPLING: edli_bias_correction_enabled forces identity Platt on the corrected p_raw domain; this K3 shrink is a one-sided LCB haircut, NOT a p_raw re-calibration, so it does not break that lockstep — promoting it to a full re-calibration would require resolving the corrected-domain contract first.
edli._bias_decay_kelly_haircut_note: 2026-05-31 operator directive (INTERIM, data-insufficient phase only): pre-submit, before Kelly sizing, look up per-city forecast bias (model_bias_ens.effective_bias_c, edli_per_city_v1 VERIFIED bucket). If |bias| exceeds the unit-aware threshold (bias_decay_threshold_c for C-settled cities; bias_decay_threshold_f for F-settled SF/Seattle), multiply the Kelly multiplier by bias_decay_kelly_factor (0.5 = halve). FAIL-SAFE: no VERIFIED bias row (data absent = the data-insufficient trigger) -> apply haircut + WARN. FAIL-OPEN on UNEXPECTED ERROR only: any exception -> NO haircut + WARN (never crash or zero a live size). Distinct from edli_bias_correction_enabled (A): does NOT shift p_raw, only sizes DOWN untrustworthy-bias cities. Remove when per-bucket sufficiency + per-city #24<=1 stable. Evidence: corrected-#24 showed full A-correction worsens #24-vs-online (edge-reversal); haircut is the safe interim.
edli._edli_bias_correction_enabled_note: 2026-05-31 A4 fix: when ON, _snapshot_p_raw subtracts the per-city promoted model_bias_ens.effective_bias_c (lead/season/product-keyed, VERIFIED authority, weight_live>0) from member maxes BEFORE p_raw, and forces identity Platt for the corrected p_raw_domain (train/serve lockstep — calibration_pairs were fit on uncorrected p_raw). FAIL-CLOSED: no VERIFIED promoted row for the bucket -> raw members + bias_corrected=False (no correction, trading continues). ACTIVATED 2026-05-31 (true): the settled-truth backtest (170-232 past targets/city vs SETTLED observations, /tmp/settled_val.py) proved the correction moves p_raw toward real truth for all 9 cities (SF bin_bias<=1 8%->65%, TelAviv 5%->52%, Singapore 32%->63%), and the degC->degF unit fix lands F-settled cities correctly. SHADOW ONLY (real_order_submit_enabled stays false) — no capital. The unshadow gate is per-city #24-vs-SETTLED (NOT #24-vs-online: the online forecast shares the cold bias, so it wrongly rewards raw-cold). Canonical evidence: ~/.openclaw/workspace-venus/EDLI_BIAS_REPLAY_RESULT_2026_05_31.md + promotion_table.json.
edli._replacement_q_market_anchor_note_2026_0: operator directive 2026-06-12 (entry wrong-order class must be fixed) + replay evidence /tmp/k2_market_anchor_replay.md: cap blocks none of the 4 C3 ring losses but shrinks edge 3-63% (Beijing -63%), Jun-11 winners survive (-3/-22%), C4 tail harvest structurally exempt via the 1.5-step distance gate. Interim size-reduction antibody; retire when sigma-shape correction is validated. Cap activations logged at zeus.replacement_qlcb_shadow.
edli._replacement_q_market_anchor_note: Objective-math audit 2026-06-11 (docs/evidence/2026_06_11_objective_math/), DEFAULT FALSE, HIGH risk (moves the live tradable q_lcb). When ON, a near-center buy_no candidate's tradable q_lcb_no is CAPPED at the legacy alpha-blend of model-NO with the market-implied NO (src/strategy/market_fusion semantics, single authority; alpha = edge.base_alpha level-3). Part A evidence: the sigma-flattened fused q under-weights its OWN adjacent-center bins vs the sharper market (class C3: -4.8pt mean, 74% of cells, 30-54pt tails incl. Denver/NYC/Miami) -> max(q_lcb-price) ranks the phantom NO edge FIRST. The cap is ONE-SIDED (only lowers q_lcb -> can never create a trade) and scoped to C1-C3 (the far-NO favorite-longshot harvest C4 is market~=model, left untouched). Direction-law bans STAY as defense-in-depth. Flip only on operator word AFTER forward fills license it.
edli._replacement_0_1_fused_q_shape_note: 2026-06-09 operator-directed promotion (the 'optimal final mathematical form'): the replacement q is built DIRECTLY from N(mu*, sigma_pred) via emos.bin_probability_settlement (ONE integrator), replacing the AIFS member-vote shape AND the anchor_weight=0.8 heuristic on the replacement path. Evidence: AIFS-replacement experiment n=39 settled cells — the AIFS shape put EXACTLY ZERO on the winning bin in 11/39 (support truncation; unconstructable under a Normal); LogLoss 11.07->1.51, hit 25.6%->46.2%; mu* MAE 0.77C vs anchor 1.27C. sigma_pred = sqrt(fused_sd^2 + walk-forward fused-center residual std^2), floor 1.0C (conservative per the experiment's lead-0 tight-sigma caveat). FAIL-CLOSED to the soft-anchor q on any construction error. /tmp/aifs_replacement_experiment.md
edli._mass_enable_note_2026_06_09: Operator directive 2026-06-09 ('全部打开') + flag-implementation review verdicts (/tmp/flag_implementation_review.md): ENABLED q_lcb_settlement_coverage_gate (verified wired, decision-level, only lowers LCB, fail-open). DELETED stale_book_directional_trading_enabled (zero consumers in src/, dead key; OpeningStaleQuoteFOK never instantiated live) and mainstream_agreement_enforce_on_submit (operator: manual test item). The forecast_sharpness_gate (Wave-1 2026-06-12) was DELETED ENTIRELY — at 1.5x multiplier it suppressed edges for 50/54 cities (season-blended MAE defect); if sharpness ever matters it must be rebuilt inside calibrated q, never as a veto. Wave-2 2026-06-12 DELETED (settlement-refuted, code + key + tests removed): the typed-BiasTreatment DAY0-Kelly correction flag (would have changed DAY0 Kelly sizes; branch deleted) and the replacement_0_1 EB anchor-bias correction flag (settlement-refuted wrong-set; src/calibration/replacement_eb_bias.py module deleted). The three settlement-σ-floor flags (enabled / required / replacement-qlcb) were MERGED to one per-cell data-availability construction rule (Wave-2 item 6). NOTE: legacy edli_bias_correction_enabled + bias_decay haircut are INERT on the primary FORECAST lane while edli_emos_sole_calibrator_enabled=true (bias maze bypassed); they fire only on DAY0/emos-miss.

Promotion to live day0 remains a separate operator decision on the comparator's settled evidence (>51% after-cost bar, ~150-270 samples).
edli._replacement_0_1_intermediate_cycle_live: 2026-06-10 operator directive (re-applied + git-committed 2026-06-11): intermediate-cycle (06/18Z) posteriors admitted LIVE as the standing cycle mode. Math case: the pipeline is phase-invariant by construction except the pooled de-bias scalar; measured phase shift <=0.21C (95% worst ~0.7C) << sigma floor 1.33C (docs/evidence/cycle_phase_qualification/2026-06-11_06z18z_offline_study.md). The first application of this flip (2026-06-11 ~07:53Z) was LOST to an unverified uncommitted settings write (file mtime matched the flip, key absent; never in git) - 10h of REPLACEMENT_0_1_LIVE_AUTHORITY_INTERMEDIATE_CYCLE_SHADOW_ONLY blocks followed. Law: every operator flag flip = atomic edit + resolver read-back in a fresh interpreter + immediate git commit, so a silent revert is a visible diff.

calibration._transfer_logit_sigma_scale_note: Chain-rule logit slope at p=0.5 used to map OOS Brier-diff to logit-space σ for cross-domain Platt transfer uncertainty (Phase α, Issue 2.4). Default 4.0. Operator-tunable once OOS Brier-diff corpus is available.

pin._pin_eligibility_note: TIGGE spec v3 §3 Phase 0 #6 / critic v2 A2 BLOCKER: c12 IFS-ENS has NO data on disk for 2024-01-01..2024-06-01 (cloud ground truth §4). Cycle-stratified Platt requires ≥1y rolling 12z corpus, so cycle-stratified pin eligibility floor = 2025-06-02. Frozen-as-of values older than this floor MUST resolve via pooled-cycle config (legacy single-cycle '00' bucket), not cycle-stratified buckets, until the c12 2024-H1 gap is recovered or the floor moves forward.
pin._pin_note: Zeus #64 ship-readiness C2: pinned at first ft_v1 HIGH promote. 137 HIGH ft_v1 cohorts on world.db platt_models_v2 (is_active=1). LOW pin TBD when LOW ships (Phase F follow-up).

day0._n_mc_note: Day0 nowcast Monte Carlo iterations. Bumped 2026-04-29 from 5000 to 10000 in lockstep with ensemble.n_mc per LAW 4 forbidden move 7 (runtime per-trade precision >= 5000; 10000 preferred).

edge._base_alpha_note: HARDCODED. Replace after 100+ settlements by comparing Model Brier vs Market Brier per calibration level.
edge._spread_tight_f_note: HARDCODED. Replace after 1000+ ENS snapshots per city using per-city ensemble spread percentiles.
edge._spread_wide_f_note: HARDCODED. Replace after 1000+ ENS snapshots per city using per-city ensemble spread percentiles.
edge._fdr_alpha_note: HARDCODED. Replace after 500+ candidate evaluations using observed false positive rate vs target FDR.

sizing._kelly_multiplier_note: HARDCODED. Replace after 500+ settlements using empirical edge-estimation error and optimal Kelly fraction. 2026-06-08 operator: 0.25->0.125 proving phase. 2026-06-09 operator: 0.125->0.0625 (realized 10-40 above envelope). 2026-06-10 operator: 0.0625->0.125 RESTORED — 1/16 was over-weakened: realized stakes ~3.5 USD fell below the 5-share venue min order on mid-price NO bins, blocking even good edges; 5-15 envelope unreachable at 1/16. FINAL fractional-Kelly layer; composes with cash sizing base, portfolio-heat, correlation, DeltaU concavity (stacking audit 2026-06-10 pending).
sizing._max_single_position_pct_note: 2026-06-09 operator directive: NO concentration CAP. A hard dollar/percent cap is NOT the system's sizing mechanism and BREAKS Kelly (it overrides the structural portfolio-heat + correlation + DeltaU-concavity attenuation that the K4/K5/K6 relationship tests enforce) -- same one-off-cap anti-pattern as the deleted tiny_live. 0.0 disables the ceiling on BOTH money_path_adapters.evaluate_kelly AND the bin-selection DeltaU choke point. Position size is determined SOLELY by the layered fractional Kelly: kelly_multiplier(0.125) x cash-sizing-base x portfolio-heat-attenuation x correlation-reduction x DeltaU-marginal-log-utility-with-existing-exposure. The proving-phase ~$5-15 envelope comes from the small 0.125 fractional Kelly on a ~$1k wallet, NOT a cap. Revisit kelly_multiplier (not a cap) after the first forward-settled fills.

exit._reversal_confirmations_note: Legacy alias retained for compatibility. Use consecutive_confirmations for new code.
exit._expiry_hours_note: Legacy alias retained for compatibility. Use near_settlement_hours for new code.
exit._consecutive_confirmations_note: HARDCODED. Replace after 500+ exit events by comparing 1/2/3-cycle false-positive rates.
exit._near_settlement_hours_note: HARDCODED. Replace after 100+ near-settlement trades per city using per-city optimal hold window.
exit._buy_no_scaling_factor_note: HARDCODED. Replace after 200+ buy_no settlements using optimal scaling from historical edge noise.
exit._buy_yes_scaling_factor_note: HARDCODED. Replace after 200+ buy_yes settlements using optimal scaling from historical edge noise.
exit._buy_no_floor_note: HARDCODED. Replace after analyzing historical forward-edge noise floor for buy_no exits.
exit._buy_no_ceiling_note: HARDCODED. Replace after observing deep buy_no reversals and false-hold rate.
exit._buy_yes_floor_note: HARDCODED. Replace after analyzing historical forward-edge noise floor for buy_yes exits.
exit._buy_yes_ceiling_note: HARDCODED. Replace after observing deep buy_yes reversals and false-hold rate.
exit._divergence_soft_threshold_note: HARDCODED. Soft divergence trigger requires confirmation from adverse market velocity. Replace after replay + live divergence audit.
exit._divergence_hard_threshold_note: HARDCODED. Hard divergence panic threshold. Replace after replay + live divergence audit.
exit._divergence_velocity_confirm_note: HARDCODED. Minimum adverse 1h market velocity required to confirm soft divergence panic.
exit._fee_rate_note: T6.4 HoldValue fee estimate uses polymarket_fee(best_bid, fee_rate); 0.05 matches execution_price.py:130 default (calibrated against Polymarket fee schedule). HARDCODED — revisit after observed-exit-fee corpus stabilizes.
exit._daily_hurdle_rate_note: T6.4 opportunity-cost rate per day of locked capital (0.01%/day ≈ 3.65%/year conservative hurdle). HARDCODED — replace with live-readiness B3 derived value once realized-return corpus exceeds 100 settlements.
exit._correlation_crowding_rate_note: T6.4-phase2 correlation-crowding cost rate. Cost model: crowding_cost_usd = rate × correlated_exposure_ratio × shares × best_bid. rate=0.01 means 1% of exit notional per unit of correlated exposure across other held positions. Default 0.0 = no-op (safe default — feature-flag OFF preserves pre-T6.4-phase2 behavior even when HOLD_VALUE_EXIT_COSTS flips ON). Operator raises after T6.3-followup-1 replay audit measures should_exit sensitivity. HARDCODED until live-readiness B3 corpus.

settlement._disagreement_tolerance_note: Max absolute difference (°C) between settlement_value (UMA-resolved) and observation_value (WU-derived) to classify as SOURCE_DISAGREEMENT rather than genuine obs_outside_bin. Added 2026-05-08 for fix #263.

feature_flags._full_transport_live_enabled_note: Zeus #64 FT-ship F1/F2 (2026-05-26): when ON, BOTH the entry evaluator (evaluator.py period_extrema + ens-signal branches) AND monitor_refresh use p_raw_vector_with_error_model (bias-corrected + residual-widened MC, error_model_family='full_transport_v1') instead of plain p_raw. FAIL-OPEN: flag ON but no VERIFIED model_bias_ens_v2 row for the bucket → falls back to plain p_raw + WARNING log (trading continues). GFS crosscheck site NOT wired (wrong model family for GFS members). Operator pre-promote checklist: run 'python scripts/promote_model_bias_ens_v2.py inspect', validate shadow LogLoss/RPS, run promote --commit. Default OFF.
feature_flags._exit_bias_family_unify_FLIP_2026_06_12: FLIPPED ON (operator word 全执行 + unshadow gate met: docs/evidence/exit_path_replay/2026-06-12_bias_family_unify_before_after.md — 74 VERIFIED edli_per_city_v1 rows/50 cities replayed on real member arrays; settled-truth 6 improved/2 degraded (both Istanbul pnl=0 mild-cold); dominant COLD bias 46/74 rows = exit was over-stating p_no exactly on the loss class; fail-closed on missing row). Exit belief now matches entry belief (bias-shift-only + identity-Platt, A4 lockstep). Watch first Istanbul exits post-flip.
feature_flags._exit_bias_family_unify_enabled_note: D2 bias-family entry/exit unify (2026-06-03, wiring verdict 2026-06-03). DEFAULT OFF (shadow). Closes the D2 asymmetry: the LIVE EDLI reactor ENTRY bias-corrects p_raw from error_model_family='edli_per_city_v1' (71 VERIFIED rows, the populated family) with bias-shift-ONLY + identity-Platt (A4 train/serve lockstep, src/engine/event_reactor_adapter.py _snapshot_p_raw/_snapshot_p_cal), while the cycle evaluator FT path (evaluator.py _resolve_ft_error_model_for_entry) and the EXIT monitor (monitor_refresh.py _resolve_ft_error_model) read error_model_family='full_transport_v1' (ZERO rows) gated by full_transport_live_enabled. Net today: entry corrected, exit/monitor uncorrected AND the exit FT route is permanently dead (0-row family). When THIS flag is ON, the evaluator-FT + monitor read sites instead request error_model_family=event_reactor_adapter._EDLI_BIAS_FAMILY using the reactor's exact read shape (month=target_month, target_month=target_month, lead_bucket=None — the stored rows are lead_bucket='LEGACY_POOLED', so the legacy ft read shape month=0/lead_bucket=computed 0-row-missed them) AND apply the A4 lockstep on exit: bias-shift-ONLY (NO residual-widening) + identity-Platt (skip calibrate_and_normalize on the bias-shifted domain), so EXIT belief matches ENTRY belief. CRITICAL: a pure family-string repoint would be a HALF-FIX — the legacy ft path residual-widens then applies real Platt on the shifted domain, introducing a NEW entry/exit asymmetry; this flag carries the full consistent treatment, not just the family swap. FAIL-CLOSED: no VERIFIED edli_per_city_v1 row for the bucket → plain p_raw + real Platt (today's uncorrected behaviour), trading continues. When OFF, the legacy full_transport_v1 path under full_transport_live_enabled=false is byte-identical to today (inert). The new flag and full_transport_live_enabled are independent: if BOTH are ON, the new flag's edli_per_city_v1 + identity-Platt treatment takes precedence on the evaluator-FT + monitor sites. Unshadow gate: per-city exit-vs-entry belief-delta review on the before/after (BEFORE_AFTER_bias_family_unify.md) + settled-truth confirmation the corrected exit belief tracks reality (same gate as edli_bias_correction_enabled). Authority: D2 bias-family unify / wiring verdict 2026-06-03.
feature_flags._HOLD_VALUE_EXIT_COSTS_note: FLIPPED ON 2026-06-12 (operator word '需要测试的现在就测试好，然后依次全执行' + replay verdict docs/evidence/exit_path_replay/2026-06-12_canonical_vs_legacy.md): 3052 monitor refreshes replayed, 72 divergences in 3 positions, all canonical=sell-permit on the belief≈bid knife edge; settled truth 0 winners sold / 18 loser-exits / +20.70 USD net; monotone (canonical net_value <= legacy, can only permit MORE exits). CANONICAL_EXIT_PATH verified pure settlement-bookkeeping routing (mark_settled wraps compute_settlement_close; identical P&L). Legacy zero-cost branch deletion = Wave 2 follow-up.
feature_flags._NATIVE_MULTIBIN_BUY_NO_note: Default OFF. Shadow enables source/test materialization of multi-bin buy_no only from native NO-token quotes; live additionally gates live entry submission and must remain false until operator promotion evidence exists.
feature_flags._ddd_v2_enabled_note: Two-Rail Data Density Discount (RERUN_PLAN_v2.md §5 D-E live wiring 2026-05-03). Rail 1 HALT for cov<0.35; Rail 2 linear discount D=min(0.09, 0.20×shortfall). F2 fail-CLOSED on NO_TRAIN_DATA / EXCLUDED / unconfigured cities → rejection_stage='DDD_NO_TRAIN_DATA' / 'DDD_EXCLUDED_WORKSTREAM_A' / 'DDD_CITY_UNCONFIGURED'. Default ON. Disable to revert to pre-DDD-v2 behavior (oracle_penalty.py only) without code change.
feature_flags._calibration_bin_source_v2_fit_enabled_n: FIX-1 (2026-06-03): when ON, get_decision_group_count and _fit_from_pairs both filter by CANONICAL_CALIBRATION_PAIR_BIN_SOURCE (canonical_v2) so the count gate and fit query ONE identical population. Affects only the <=7 uncorrected cities (HK/Auckland/Jinan/Zhengzhou/Dallas/Jakarta/Lagos) that reach get_calibrator without bias-correction early-exit. Flag-OFF (default): legacy bin_source_filter=None behavior byte-identical to pre-fix (0 pairs on the all-v2 corpus -> cross-cluster Platt borrow). Flag-ON: own canonical_v2 read-time fit replaces foreign-cluster borrow. Daemon is SHADOW (real_order_submit_enabled=false). Operator promotion gate: review BEFORE_AFTER_canonical_bin_source.md in worktree fix/calibration-bin-source-canonical-v2, then set to true.
